## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal/CV data (`data/`) committed
- [ ] Screenshots/preview attached for UI changes (if applicable)
